twitter_thread: 85% of my top 20 Android productivity apps aren't on the Play Store.
I use F-Droid for 12 open-source apps and APKMirror for 5 direct downloads.
Sideloading from untrusted sites infected my device 3 times last year.
5 non-Play Store apps I rely on: Tasks for todo lists, Markor for notes, OpenNote for encryption, Nextcloud for cloud storage, and Tutanota for email.
These 5 apps saved me 2 hours daily by streamlining my workflow.
I've found 17 more non-Play Store apps with unique features.
What's the most useful non-Play Store app you've discovered? #androidapps #productivity
pack.linkedin: After cataloging my top 20 Android productivity apps, I found that 85% aren't on the Play Store. Using F-Droid and APKMirror, I've discovered 17 apps with unique features like Tasks, Markor, and Tutanota. However, I've had 3 devices infected with malware from untrusted sideloading sites. What non-Play Store apps do you use, and how do you vet them for safety?
tiktok_hooks: I just found 17 Android apps that will change your productivity workflow
Delete the Play Store, these 5 hidden apps are all you need
The 5 Android apps I use every day that aren't on the Play Store
pack.reddit_headline: Can you name 5 Android productivity apps not on the Play Store that are worth the risk?
